hooks.command: echo 'CRITICAL RULES (post-compaction): Read .claude/rules/core.md for Rules 0-9. Domain rules auto-load from .claude/rules/ when editing matching files. Enforcement: types > guards > lints > hooks > rules > docs.'

echo '⛔ MANDATORY SKILL ACTIVATION — NO EXCEPTIONS:
You MUST activate a skill via Skill() tool before writing ANY response.
1. SCAN available skills for matches
2. If a specialized skill matches → activate it
3. If NO specialized skill matches → activate general skill
4. NEVER respond without loading a skill first
VIOLATION: Writing code, prose, or answers without an active skill is FORBIDDEN.'
